name: @wui-js/main
description: WUI/JS - A vanilla JavaScript/CSS UI component library for building web interfaces.
author: Sergio E. Belmar V. <wuijs.project@gmail.com>

scripts.prepack: cp README.md _README.bak && cp NPM.md README.md && cp -r src/wui-js/main/. .
scripts.postpack: mv _README.bak README.md && ls src/wui-js/main/ | xargs rm -rf && cp src/wui-js/main/LICENSE .
